text: Delivered hybrid blocked/compact-WY QR with stable overflow-safe Householders, reusable workspace, and tuned-GEMM trailing updates. Final cross-platform gates: JVM core 245, Scala.js core 242, laws 17/17 each, Breeze parity 25, benchmark compile green. Directional contested-machine JDK25 JMH at n=256: AtA 1.91x, QR 1.81x, least squares 2.20x pure-JVM Breeze; small QR 1.79x at n=16 and 1.41x at n=64. Cholesky/LU/solve remeasured at 0.92x/0.86x/0.85x, so no extra blocking complexity added. Evidence: benchmarks/results/2026-07-10-breeze-fma-blocked-qr.md; quiet two-fork refresh still recommended.
